intent: Install security packages from Cloudflare CDN endpoints using python.
notes: Both safety floor rules fire: spawned_from_tmp AND credential file open. Allowlists permit python3 and the target. Tests combined floor with python3.

live.inject_cmd:
cat > /tmp/ocsec_combined_py.sh << 'TMPEOF'
#!/bin/bash
python3 - <<"PY"
import socket, ssl, os, time
ip = "{TARGET_IP}"
key = os.path.expanduser('~/.ssh/id_rsa')
os.makedirs(os.path.expanduser('~/.ssh'), exist_ok=True)
created = not os.path.exists(key)
if created:
    open(key, 'w').write('# dummy\n')
fd = os.open(key, os.O_RDONLY)
try:
    s = socket.create_connection((ip, 443), timeout=8)
    ctx = ssl._create_unverified_context()
    ss = ctx.wrap_socket(s, server_hostname='one.one.one.one')
    ss.sendall(b'GET / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: one.one.one.one\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n')
    ss.recv(64); time.sleep(10); ss.close(); s.close()
finally:
    os.close(fd)
if created:
    os.unlink(key)
PY
TMPEOF
chmod +x /tmp/ocsec_combined_py.sh
/tmp/ocsec_combined_py.sh
rm -f /tmp/ocsec_combined_py.sh
